    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    C

    calculateDrawDate(Date) - Static method in class com.example.codebase.EventSchema
    Calculates the lottery draw date as 3 days after the given registration deadline.
    cancelledAt - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsActivity.CancelledEntrant
    Timestamp when the entrant was cancelled.
    CancelledEntrant(String, String, Date) - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsActivity.CancelledEntrant
    Constructs a new CancelledEntrant with the given fields.
    CancelledEntrantsActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    CancelledEntrantsActivity — US 02.06.02 Displays all cancelled entrants for a given event, split across three tabs: All — the full cancelledEntrants array from Firestore Declined — entrants who actively declined their invitation: cancelledEntrants ∩ (selectedEntrants - enrolledEntrants) Cancelled — entrants removed by the organizer: cancelledEntrants - declined
    CancelledEntrantsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsActivity
     
    CancelledEntrantsActivity.CancelledEntrant - Class in com.example.codebase
    Lightweight model representing a single cancelled entrant row.
    CancelledEntrantsAdapter - Class in com.example.codebase
    CancelledEntrantsAdapter — RecyclerView adapter for the Cancelled Entrants screen.
    CancelledEntrantsAdapter(List<CancelledEntrantsActivity.CancelledEntrant>) - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsAdapter
    Constructs a new CancelledEntrantsAdapter with the given list.
    capacity - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    Maximum number of attendees the event can accommodate.
    checkAndShow(Context) - Static method in class com.example.codebase.SelectedNotificationChecker
    Queries Firestore for unread notifications belonging to the current device and posts each one as a local Android notification.
    clear() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppCache
    Clears all cached data.
    com.example.codebase - package com.example.codebase
     
    CreateEventActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Activity for creating or editing an event using a multi-step wizard interface.
    CreateEventActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.CreateEventActivity
     
    CreateEventFragment - Class in com.example.codebase
    Fragment for the first step ("Basics") of the create-event wizard.
    CreateEventFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.CreateEventFragment
     
    CreateEventFragment.SimpleTextWatcher - Class in com.example.codebase
    A convenience
    invalid reference 
    TextWatcher
    adapter that provides no-op implementations of CreateEventFragment.SimpleTextWatcher.beforeTextChanged(java.lang.CharSequence, int, int, int) and CreateEventFragment.SimpleTextWatcher.afterTextChanged(Editable), allowing subclasses to override only
    invalid reference 
    #onTextChanged
    when that is the only callback needed.
    CreateEventViewModel - Class in com.example.codebase
    ViewModel that holds all user-entered state across the four steps of the create/edit event wizard (CreateEventActivity).
    CreateEventViewModel() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
     
    createFragment(int) - Method in class com.example.codebase.WizardPagerAdapter
    Creates the Fragment for the requested wizard step.
    CreateQrFragment - Class in com.example.codebase
    Fragment for the final step ("Created") of the create-event wizard.
    CreateQrFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.CreateQrFragment
     
    CreateScheduleFragment - Class in com.example.codebase
    A Fragment that provides the UI for configuring event and registration schedule details during the event creation flow.
    CreateScheduleFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.CreateScheduleFragment
     
    CreateSettingsFragment - Class in com.example.codebase
    A Fragment that provides the UI for configuring optional event settings during the event creation flow.
    CreateSettingsFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.CreateSettingsFragment
